# Sysctl Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-sysctl
kind: Sysctl
spec:
    values: {}
    writeFile: example
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: Sysctl
spec:
  writeFile: /etc/sysctl.d/99-kubernetes-cri.conf
  apply: true
  values:
    net.ipv4.ip_forward: 1
```
